files_created.description: Governed Materialization & Reproducibility Contract — primary document. Defines artifact schemas, canonical paths, field-by-field source mappings, fail-closed triggers, provenance continuity rules, audit contract, and consumption rules for 43.3 and 44.2 runtime artifacts.

Governed Reproduction & Replay Contract. Defines ordered 7-step replay procedure (R-1 through R-7), required inputs, checksum verification method, deterministic execution order (41.x → 43.3 → 44.2), and replay equivalence rule.

Stream-level validation log confirming completeness of all defined contracts. 9 validation checks: PASS for all dimensions including input inventory, schema completeness (43.3 and 44.2), provenance continuity, reproduction completeness, fail-closed completeness, checksum method, audit contract, and blocker resolution scope.
This file. Record of all files created and modified by Stream 43.31.
Human-readable record of decisions made in Stream 43.31 and the rationale for scope boundaries.
Stream closure record confirming contract locked, status COMPLETE, and scope of blocks lifted.
Execution contract for Stream 43.31 as filed in the contracts registry.
